8 Graphic Design Trends Dominating 2026

Author: Kay | Published: 2026-03-07

Design trends in 2026 reflect a fascinating tension between technology and humanity. AI-assisted design workflows are now mainstream. The top trends include maximalist typography, hyper-personalised brand systems, tactile textures, and vibrant colour clashing.
